subject: Back steps railing
snippet: Hey, checking in on the back steps railing. Did you get the right screws...
body:
Hey, checking in on the back steps railing. Did you get the right screws, or do we still need a trip to the hardware store? I want it solid before the grandkids are running around here this summer.

Also, did you ever look at that drip under the kitchen sink? Don't want it turning into a bigger job.

subject: Re: Back steps railing
snippet: Good news — got the screws this morning and the railing's already tight....
body:
Good news — got the screws this morning and the railing's already tight. Took about twenty minutes.

Still need to crawl under the sink but I think it's just a loose fitting. I'll get to it today. Will keep you posted!

subject: Neighborhood meeting Thursday
snippet: Hey, I got the draft agenda for Thursday's Millvale neighborhood associa...
body:
Hey, I got the draft agenda for Thursday's Millvale neighborhood association meeting. There's a lot on the list — the parking situation, the field landscaping proposal, and something about new lights at the park.

Do you think you'll make it, or are you still tied up with practice? Let me know so I can RSVP for one or both of us.

subject: Re: Neighborhood meeting Thursday
snippet: I should be done with practice by 6:30, so I can probably catch at least...
body:
I should be done with practice by 6:30, so I can probably catch at least the second half. Is it still at the community center on Grant Ave?

Can you grab the full agenda? I'd like to look at the details on the park lights proposal before we go.

subject: Re: Neighborhood meeting Thursday
snippet: Yes, still at the community center — starts at 7. I'll forward you the a...
body:
Yes, still at the community center — starts at 7. I'll forward you the agenda, I think it came through my other email.

And yes, the park lights item is the most controversial one. The Hendersons are apparently strongly opposed. Should be an interesting meeting.

subject: League board meeting prep
snippet: Hey, just a reminder that you have the league board meeting tomorrow at ...
body:
Hey, just a reminder that you have the league board meeting tomorrow at 2. You mentioned last week wanting to bring up the field regrading with the borough — did you ever put your notes together on that?

I know you've been slammed with the season, but this feels like an important one. Don't let it slip by again!

subject: Re: League board meeting prep
snippet: Ugh, thanks for the nudge. I completely let that slide. Going to use the...
body:
Ugh, thanks for the nudge. I completely let that slide. Going to use the afternoon to put a quick summary together.

Main points: the low spot by third base is a hazard, the borough promised a regrade, and I want to propose new bases too. Does that framing sound right to you?

subject: Re: League board meeting prep
snippet: That sounds really solid. I'd also add what you've already done to keep ...
body:
That sounds really solid. I'd also add what you've already done to keep the kids safe on it in the meantime — that way it doesn't come across as just complaining to the borough.

Also, is there anything you want to bring up about next season's registration? Board meetings are good for that too.

subject: Re: League board meeting prep
snippet: Great point — I'll mention the cones I put over the low spot. That shoul...
body:
Great point — I'll mention the cones I put over the low spot. That should help.

And you're right about registration. I've been meaning to push for opening it earlier this year. Maybe now's finally the time. Thanks for the push, this was really helpful.

subject: Coaching clearance reminder
snippet: Hey, did you see the email from the league about the mandatory coaching ...
body:
Hey, did you see the email from the league about the mandatory coaching clearances and background check? It's due by the end of the month. I just finished mine for the concession stand — took about 45 minutes.

Just want to make sure you saw it because the deadline is closer than it looks.

subject: Re: Coaching clearance reminder
snippet: I saw it but honestly completely forgot about it. Thanks for flagging. I...
body: I saw it but honestly completely forgot about it. Thanks for flagging. Is it the same site we used for the clearances last year? I can never find the link when I need it.

subject: Re: Coaching clearance reminder
snippet: Yes, same site — the state clearance portal. I'll forward you the origin...
body:
Yes, same site — the state clearance portal. I'll forward you the original email, it has a direct link in it. Just log in with the account Matt set up for you.

The forms are pretty dry but you upload your ID at the end, so have that handy before you click through.

subject: Re: Coaching clearance reminder
snippet: Got the email, thanks. Just started the first form. You weren't kidding ...
body:
Got the email, thanks. Just started the first form. You weren't kidding — it's really something. Only a few more pages to go.

How did you get through this without falling asleep?

subject: Re: Coaching clearance reminder
snippet: I did it in two sittings and kept coffee close. The good news is you can...
body:
I did it in two sittings and kept coffee close. The good news is you can save and come back, so don't feel like you have to power through it all at once.

The child-safety section toward the end is actually worth reading. You'll see what I mean. Good luck!

subject: Lunch this week?
snippet: Hey man, are you free for lunch any day this week? I'm pretty flexible — Tuesday...
body:
Hey man, are you free for lunch any day this week? I'm pretty flexible — Tuesday or Wednesday work best for me. Was thinking we could try that new ramen place on Penn Ave that opened last month. Everyone I know has been raving about it.

Let me know what works.

subject: Re: Lunch this week?
snippet: Wednesday works great! I've been wanting to check that place out — I thi...
body:
Wednesday works great! I've been wanting to check that place out — I think I actually walked past it last week. Noon work for you?

Good excuse to get out of the garage for a bit. This week's been busy with the season.

subject: Coffee next Tuesday?
snippet: Hey Joyce, feels like it's been forever since we've actually caught up properly....
body:
Hey Joyce, feels like it's been forever since we've actually caught up properly. You free for coffee next Tuesday morning? I'm thinking around 9 before things get hectic. Could do Commonplace or wherever's easiest for you.

Let me know!

subject: Re: Coffee next Tuesday?
snippet: Tuesday morning works! Let's do Commonplace, I haven't been in a while. ...
body:
Tuesday morning works! Let's do Commonplace, I haven't been in a while. 9:15 okay? Might be a few minutes late depending on traffic.

What's going on with you? Last I heard you were dealing with that thing you mentioned. All good?

subject: Re: Coffee next Tuesday?
snippet: 9:15 is perfect, I'll grab us a table. And yeah, that thing mostly sorte...
body:
9:15 is perfect, I'll grab us a table. And yeah, that thing mostly sorted itself out — I'll fill you in when I see you. Let's just say I came out of it better than I expected.

See you Tuesday!

subject: Birthday brunch plans
snippet: Okay so your birthday is coming up in two weeks and I think we need to actually ...
body:
Okay so your birthday is coming up in two weeks and I think we need to actually celebrate this year. I was thinking brunch on the day itself — Saturday the 12th. Was thinking Whitfield at the Ace Hotel, I know you've been wanting to go.

You in? Can Gloria come too?

subject: Re: Birthday brunch plans
snippet: Ha, you actually remembered! Definitely in. Gloria would love that — she's been ...
body:
Ha, you actually remembered! Definitely in. Gloria would love that — she's been talking about Whitfield for months. And the 12th works perfectly, nothing else going on.

Should we keep it small or invite a few other people?

subject: Re: Birthday brunch plans
snippet: Let's keep it small — just you, me, Gloria, and Steph. More relaxed that way and...
body:
Let's keep it small — just you, me, Gloria, and Steph. More relaxed that way and we can actually talk. I'll make a reservation for 11am if that works for you.

Also, I'm covering brunch for you and Gloria. No arguments.

subject: Re: Birthday brunch plans
snippet: 11am is perfect, works great for us. And I'm not going to fight you too hard on ...
body:
11am is perfect, works great for us. And I'm not going to fight you too hard on the brunch thing — thank you, seriously.

Tell Steph we're excited. It's been way too long. This is going to be a great time.

subject: Renewal options
snippet: Hey, I got a call from our internet provider today saying our contract is up nex...
body:
Hey, I got a call from our internet provider today saying our contract is up next month and they want to lock us in for another two years. The rep said our rate goes up by $20 a month if we don't renew.

Did you want to stay with them or should we look around? I know Comcast has been running some promotions lately.

subject: Re: Renewal options
snippet: I knew this was coming up. I say we shop around a little before committing to an...
body:
I knew this was coming up. I say we shop around a little before committing to anything. Our speeds have been really inconsistent lately and I'm not thrilled about locking in for two years if the service doesn't improve.

Can you get the specifics on the renewal rate versus the rollover price so we have numbers to compare?

subject: Re: Renewal options
snippet: The renewal would be $79 a month for the same plan, up from $59. If we don't ren...
body:
The renewal would be $79 a month for the same plan, up from $59. If we don't renew it rolls to $89. I told them I'd call back by Friday.

I also checked Comcast's site — they're offering 300 Mbps for $69 a month for 12 months, but I don't know what happens after the promo ends. Probably jumps up a lot.

subject: Re: Renewal options
snippet: Yeah, those intro rates always look good until month 13 and then it's suddenly $...
body:
Yeah, those intro rates always look good until month 13 and then it's suddenly $115. I'd rather try to negotiate with our current provider first.

Could you call them back and push for a better deal? Tell them we're seriously considering switching — sometimes that works. See if you can get them down to $65 for two years.

subject: Re: Renewal options
snippet: Okay, I'll be the negotiator. I'll call them tomorrow morning when I have more p...
body:
Okay, I'll be the negotiator. I'll call them tomorrow morning when I have more patience for it. If they won't budge at all I think we seriously consider the Comcast switch — the 12-month savings would add up even factoring in the eventual rate bump.

I'll report back after the call.

subject: Vendor invoice question
snippet: Hey, I got an invoice from the HVAC company for $340 but the estimate they gave ...
body:
Hey, I got an invoice from the HVAC company for $340 but the estimate they gave us was $280. There's a line item for "additional refrigerant" that was never mentioned to me beforehand.

Did the tech say anything to you about needing extra refrigerant when he was there? I don't want to pay a surprise charge we never agreed to.

subject: Re: Vendor invoice question
snippet: The tech did mention the refrigerant was low while he was checking the unit, but...
body:
The tech did mention the refrigerant was low while he was checking the unit, but he didn't give me a price for it — he just said he'd top it off. I assumed it was included in the service call.

I'll call them tomorrow morning and ask for an itemized breakdown and an explanation of when that charge should have been disclosed. Hold off on paying until we sort this out.

subject: Homeowners insurance renewal
snippet: I got the homeowners insurance renewal today. They're raising the premiu...
body:
I got the homeowners insurance renewal today. They're raising the premium by $175 a year, which brings us to $2,050. They want a decision by the 15th.

I wasn't totally surprised but $175 feels steep. Did you want to shop it around, or just renew and be done with it?

subject: Re: Homeowners insurance renewal
snippet: $175 is a big jump. I think we get a couple other quotes — I'd feel a lo...
body:
$175 is a big jump. I think we get a couple other quotes — I'd feel a lot better knowing we're not overpaying, especially after thirty-some years with no claims.

Let me call a couple agents this weekend so we have something to compare. Worth a look before we just renew.

subject: Re: Homeowners insurance renewal
snippet: Agreed. I can call our current agent too and ask if there's any loyalty ...
body:
Agreed. I can call our current agent too and ask if there's any loyalty discount for being with them this long.

And yes, let's see what else is out there just in case. Even if we end up staying, it's good to know our options. Let's talk it through this weekend.

subject: Two good reads this week
snippet: Okay I read two really good things this week and had to share. First: th...
body:
Okay I read two really good things this week and had to share. First: that piece about the Pirates' rebuilding plan — more hopeful than I expected. Really worth reading.

Second: a short article on the history of the Millvale flood of 1936. Very up your alley, I think. I'll send you the links.

subject: Re: Two good reads this week
snippet: Please send those — both sound great. I've been curious about the Pirate...
body:
Please send those — both sound great. I've been curious about the Pirates' plan. Nobody at Rosie's believes it but Eddie swears this is the year.

And I definitely want the Millvale flood one. My dad used to talk about that. Send it over.

subject: Re: Two good reads this week
snippet: Sent! Both links are in your inbox now.  The flood article has this deta...
body:
Sent! Both links are in your inbox now.

The flood article has this detail that stuck with me — the water came up past the first floor of the buildings on Grant Ave. I think about it every time the creek gets high.

Also, I started a shared folder for articles we both like. We can keep adding to it.

subject: Re: Two good reads this week
snippet: Past the first floor! That's alarming but completely believable given ho...
body:
Past the first floor! That's alarming but completely believable given how that creek acts.

I love the shared folder idea. I found something last week about restoring old hand planes that I think you'd get a kick out of — I'll drop it in. This is a good system.

subject: Grandkids this week
snippet: Hey, can we go over who's got the grandkids this week? I told Sarah I'd ...
body:
Hey, can we go over who's got the grandkids this week? I told Sarah I'd watch Emma and Jake Tuesday afternoon, but I have my dentist appointment at 3:30. And Danny asked if we could get Sophie to her soccer thing Thursday.

Can you take Tuesday pickup? I can cover the rest.

subject: Re: Grandkids this week
snippet: Tuesday works, I'll get Emma and Jake. Is it still the same door at the ...
body:
Tuesday works, I'll get Emma and Jake. Is it still the same door at the school, the Maple Street side? Just want to make sure I've got the right spot.

And yes for Thursday — is Sophie's soccer still at the field on Highland? I can take that one too if it helps.

subject: Re: Grandkids this week
snippet: Yes, Maple Street side — that's right. And thank you so much, if you can...
body:
Yes, Maple Street side — that's right. And thank you so much, if you can do Thursday too that would really help. Highland field, practice usually ends around 4:30 but they sometimes run late.

I'll let Sarah know you're getting the kids Tuesday.

subject: Re: Grandkids this week
snippet: Done, both are in my calendar now. Good call on telling Sarah — the scho...
body:
Done, both are in my calendar now. Good call on telling Sarah — the school can be particular about pickup when it's not the usual parent.

Does Sophie need anything for Thursday? Cleats, water bottle, anything like that?

subject: Re: Grandkids this week
snippet: She should already have her cleats in her bag. Maybe just throw in a sna...
body:
She should already have her cleats in her bag. Maybe just throw in a snack — she always comes off the field starving. A granola bar would do the trick.

Thanks for being so flexible this week. I owe you one!

subject: Family vacation planning
snippet: I think it's time we book something for this summer before all the good ...
body:
I think it's time we book something for this summer before all the good rentals are gone. I've been looking at Chautauqua Lake for a long weekend — beautiful cabin options and it's only about two hours away. The grandkids would love the lake.

Are you open to the first weekend in August? I found a place that sleeps everyone and has its own dock.

subject: Re: Family vacation planning
snippet: Yes, let's do it! First weekend in August works perfectly — I'll block i...
body:
Yes, let's do it! First weekend in August works perfectly — I'll block it off now. Chautauqua sounds great, and Jake has been begging to go somewhere with water all summer.

Send me the listing and I'll take a look. If the dock is good enough to fish off of, that's basically sold already.

subject: Weekend plans
snippet: Hey, do we have anything locked in for this weekend? Saturday looks pretty open ...
body:
Hey, do we have anything locked in for this weekend? Saturday looks pretty open — I was thinking the farmers market in the morning and then something low-key in the afternoon. Maybe check out that used bookstore on Butler Street everyone keeps mentioning.

Sunday I want to finally tackle the garage. We've been putting it off for months.

subject: Re: Weekend plans
snippet: Farmers market Saturday morning sounds great, I'm in. And yes, the garage is lon...
body:
Farmers market Saturday morning sounds great, I'm in. And yes, the garage is long overdue — Sunday afternoon works for me. I was actually thinking about renting one of those junk removal bins so we can genuinely get rid of stuff instead of just shuffling it around.

What time are you thinking for the market? Want to grab breakfast first?

subject: Re: Weekend plans
snippet: Good call on the bin — let's look into that Friday night. For the market, let's ...
body:
Good call on the bin — let's look into that Friday night. For the market, let's aim for 9 before it gets too crowded. We can actually eat there, they usually have the breakfast empanada stand.

This is starting to feel like a genuinely productive weekend. Let's not jinx it.

subject: Grocery run before Sunday dinner
snippet: Heading to Giant Eagle after lunch. We're low on coffee and I want to grab ...
body: Heading to Giant Eagle after lunch. We're low on coffee and I want to grab a chuck roast for Sunday. Anything you need from the store?

subject: Re: Grocery run before Sunday dinner
snippet: Grab a couple bags of ice for the cooler and some Yuengling if they have th...
body: Grab a couple bags of ice for the cooler and some Yuengling if they have the lager. And check if they've got the good rolls at the bakery counter.

subject: Re: Grocery run before Sunday dinner
snippet: Got it. They had the rolls. Skipped the beer, Eddie said he's bringing a ca...
body: Got it. They had the rolls. Skipped the beer, Eddie said he's bringing a case Sunday anyway.

subject: Sunday dinner headcount
snippet: Trying to figure out how much roast to make. Matt and Sarah are coming with...
body: Trying to figure out how much roast to make. Matt and Sarah are coming with Emma and Jake. Did Danny say if his crew is in?

subject: Re: Sunday dinner headcount
snippet: Danny texted me — he, Nicole, Sophie and Luca are all coming. So that's fou...
body: Danny texted me — he, Nicole, Sophie and Luca are all coming. So that's four of us plus eight. Ten total. Make the big pan.

subject: Re: Sunday dinner headcount
snippet: Ten it is. I'll do the mashed potatoes and you're on the grill for the corn...
body: Ten it is. I'll do the mashed potatoes and you're on the grill for the corn. Eddie's stopping by for dessert only, he said.

subject: Dr. Polak follow-up
snippet: Did you ever call Dr. Polak's office back about moving your annual physical...
body: Did you ever call Dr. Polak's office back about moving your annual physical? You keep saying you will and then baseball gets in the way.

subject: Re: Dr. Polak follow-up
snippet: Calling them this morning, I promise. I want it after the fall season wraps...
body: Calling them this morning, I promise. I want it after the fall season wraps up so I'm not rushing off to practice.

subject: Duquesne Light bill looks high
snippet: Our Duquesne Light bill jumped almost forty dollars this month. Did we run ...
body: Our Duquesne Light bill jumped almost forty dollars this month. Did we run the space heater in the garage a lot? Just want to understand it.

subject: Re: Duquesne Light bill looks high
snippet: That's the workshop. I had the heater going while I was finishing the toy c...
body: That's the workshop. I had the heater going while I was finishing the toy chest for Luca. I'll keep it to an hour at a time going forward.

subject: Emma's birthday party
snippet: Emma turns eleven next month. Matt asked if we'd host it here since our yar...
body: Emma turns eleven next month. Matt asked if we'd host it here since our yard is bigger. I said I'd check with you first.

subject: Re: Emma's birthday party
snippet: Of course we'll host. I can set up the horseshoe pit and we can do burgers ...
body: Of course we'll host. I can set up the horseshoe pit and we can do burgers on the Weber. She still into those mystery books?

subject: Re: Emma's birthday party
snippet: Obsessed. Get her the next one in that detective series, she'll lose her mi...
body: Obsessed. Get her the next one in that detective series, she'll lose her mind. Sarah will send you the title.

subject: Jake's cleats
snippet: Dad, Jake grew out of his cleats already. What size does he need for the fa...
body: Dad, Jake grew out of his cleats already. What size does he need for the fall clinic — do you have him on the roster sheet?

subject: Re: Jake's cleats
snippet: He's a youth 1 now, maybe a 1.5 to be safe with the growing feet. Dick's on...
body: He's a youth 1 now, maybe a 1.5 to be safe with the growing feet. Dick's on McKnight had them last week. Don't get the metal ones, league rule.

subject: Re: Jake's cleats
snippet: Molded, got it. Thanks. He's excited you've got him at second base this sea...
body: Molded, got it. Thanks. He's excited you've got him at second base this season.

subject: OpenClaw login
snippet: Dad, you texted you got locked out of the account I set up. Try the passwor...
body: Dad, you texted you got locked out of the account I set up. Try the password I put on the index card in your desk drawer, all lowercase.

subject: Re: OpenClaw login
snippet: That did it, I was capitalizing the B. Thank you. Your mother says to remin...
body: That did it, I was capitalizing the B. Thank you. Your mother says to remind you to eat something that isn't takeout.

subject: Lake weekend in the fall
snippet: Sarah found a cabin up at Deep Creek for Columbus Day weekend. Sleeps every...
body: Sarah found a cabin up at Deep Creek for Columbus Day weekend. Sleeps everyone. You and Mom want in? Kids would love it.

subject: Re: Lake weekend in the fall
snippet: We're in. As long as there's somewhere to grill and the drive isn't brutal....
body: We're in. As long as there's somewhere to grill and the drive isn't brutal. I'll bring the horseshoes and the good spatula.

subject: Re: Lake weekend in the fall
snippet: Two and a half hours, easy. I'll book it tonight. Bring a jacket, it gets c...
body: Two and a half hours, easy. I'll book it tonight. Bring a jacket, it gets cold by the water that time of year.

subject: Sophie's recital
snippet: Sophie's little dance recital is a Saturday afternoon. I know you've usuall...
body: Sophie's little dance recital is a Saturday afternoon. I know you've usually got a game — any chance you can swing by after? She keeps asking if Pap is coming.

subject: Re: Sophie's recital
snippet: Tell her Pap wouldn't miss it. Our games are all done by one, I'll head str...
body: Tell her Pap wouldn't miss it. Our games are all done by one, I'll head straight over. Save me an aisle seat so I can wave to her.

subject: Football film and the baseball overlap
snippet: Etna's playoff game got moved to Friday night, so I'm slammed with film thi...
body: Etna's playoff game got moved to Friday night, so I'm slammed with film this week. Can you take Jake home after Thursday practice so Matt doesn't have to leave work early?

subject: Re: Football film and the baseball overlap
snippet: Already planned on it. He can help me haul the bases in and I'll drop him a...
body: Already planned on it. He can help me haul the bases in and I'll drop him at Matt's after. Good luck Friday — go get 'em.

subject: Luca's cold
snippet: Heads up, Luca's got a nasty cold so we might have to skip Sunday. Don't wa...
body: Heads up, Luca's got a nasty cold so we might have to skip Sunday. Don't want him giving it to you and Mom before your physical.

subject: Re: Luca's cold
snippet: Smart. We'll miss you but there's always next week. Tell Nicole to try the ...
body: Smart. We'll miss you but there's always next week. Tell Nicole to try the honey and lemon, worked every time on you boys.

subject: Flu shots for the kids
snippet: Taking Emma and Jake for their flu shots Saturday morning. Want me to see i...
body: Taking Emma and Jake for their flu shots Saturday morning. Want me to see if the pharmacy can do yours and Gloria's at the same time?

subject: Re: Flu shots for the kids
snippet: Yes please, do us both. We'll meet you there. Bribe Jake with a milkshake a...
body: Yes please, do us both. We'll meet you there. Bribe Jake with a milkshake after, that's the only way I ever got Matt through a shot.

subject: Pot roast recipe
snippet: Okay I finally need Gloria's pot roast secret. Mine comes out dry every tim...
body: Okay I finally need Gloria's pot roast secret. Mine comes out dry every time. Is it the cut or the cook time?

subject: Re: Pot roast recipe
snippet: It's low and slow, and she sears it hard first. I'll have her write it out....
body: It's low and slow, and she sears it hard first. I'll have her write it out. Warning: there's a step involving a splash of coffee she swears by.

subject: Knee exercises
snippet: Dad, I put together a little sheet of knee-strengthening exercises for you ...
body: Dad, I put together a little sheet of knee-strengthening exercises for you — the ones Dr. Torrance mentioned. Ten minutes a day, especially before you're out on the field.

subject: Re: Knee exercises
snippet: You're a lifesaver. I'll actually do them if you keep checking up on me. Th...
body: You're a lifesaver. I'll actually do them if you keep checking up on me. The right one's been barking during warmups.

subject: Thanksgiving assignments
snippet: Starting the Thanksgiving plan early this year so nobody doubles up on pie....
body: Starting the Thanksgiving plan early this year so nobody doubles up on pie. Can you and Gloria handle the turkey and the horseshoes tournament again?

subject: Re: Thanksgiving assignments
snippet: Turkey and horseshoes, our specialty. Put me down for the smoked one this y...
body: Turkey and horseshoes, our specialty. Put me down for the smoked one this year, I've been practicing. Danny still owes me a rematch.

subject: Tuesday breakfast at Rosie's
snippet: Rosie's tomorrow, usual time? I want to hear how the clinic went. And I've ...
body: Rosie's tomorrow, usual time? I want to hear how the clinic went. And I've got a lead on cheap lumber for that workbench you keep whining about.

subject: Re: Tuesday breakfast at Rosie's
snippet: 8 o'clock, I'll be there. Cheap lumber gets my attention every time. Order ...
body: 8 o'clock, I'll be there. Cheap lumber gets my attention every time. Order me the eggs before I get there if you beat me, which you won't.

subject: Re: Tuesday breakfast at Rosie's
snippet: I always beat you. You drive like the speed limit is a suggestion in the wr...
body: I always beat you. You drive like the speed limit is a suggestion in the wrong direction. See you at 8.

subject: Steelers tickets
snippet: My nephew's got two tickets he can't use for the December home game, lower ...
body: My nephew's got two tickets he can't use for the December home game, lower level. You in? Bundle up, it'll be freezing.

subject: Re: Steelers tickets
snippet: Absolutely. Haven't been to a game in person in years. I'll drive if you bu...
body: Absolutely. Haven't been to a game in person in years. I'll drive if you buy the parking. Terrible Towels are non-negotiable.

subject: Engine 17 reunion
snippet: They're finally doing an Engine 17 reunion at the union hall. First weekend...
body: They're finally doing an Engine 17 reunion at the union hall. First weekend of November. A lot of the old crew is coming in. You have to be there.

subject: Re: Engine 17 reunion
snippet: Wouldn't miss it. Hard to believe it's been over ten years since I hung up ...
body: Wouldn't miss it. Hard to believe it's been over ten years since I hung up the helmet. I'll bring that photo I found of the '98 crew.

subject: Fall clinic schedule is up
snippet: Coach Joyce — the fall clinic schedule is posted. You've got the 7-10 group...
body: Coach Joyce — the fall clinic schedule is posted. You've got the 7-10 group Tuesdays and Thursdays at 5:30, plus Saturday games at Millvale Community Park. Confirm you're good with the field assignments.

subject: Re: Fall clinic schedule is up
snippet: Confirmed. Tuesday/Thursday 5:30 works. One ask — can we get the infield dr...
body: Confirmed. Tuesday/Thursday 5:30 works. One ask — can we get the infield dragged before Saturday games? It was rough on the kids' ankles last week.

subject: Field maintenance day
snippet: We're doing a field cleanup Saturday before the season — raking the infield...
body: We're doing a field cleanup Saturday before the season — raking the infield, fixing the dugout benches, chalk lines. Can you bring your tools and a couple of the dads?

subject: Re: Field maintenance day
snippet: I'll be there with the wheelbarrow and the good rake. I'll rope in Rick Del...
body: I'll be there with the wheelbarrow and the good rake. I'll rope in Rick Delgado and Tom, they owe me from the last workday. Coffee and donuts on me.

subject: All-Star picnic planning
snippet: Time to start planning the end-of-season All-Star picnic. You organized it ...
body: Time to start planning the end-of-season All-Star picnic. You organized it last year and the parents loved it. Same pavilion at the park? We need a headcount and a grill crew.

subject: Re: All-Star picnic planning
snippet: Same pavilion, it's perfect. I'll run the grill with Eddie. Let's get the s...
body: Same pavilion, it's perfect. I'll run the grill with Eddie. Let's get the sign-up sheet out early this time so we're not short on sides again. Aim for the third Saturday.

subject: Registration is open
snippet: Spring registration is officially open on millvalebaseball.org. Returning f...
body: Spring registration is officially open on millvalebaseball.org. Returning families get priority through the end of the month. Please remind your team parents — word of mouth fills spots fastest.

subject: Parish festival volunteers
snippet: Coach Joyce, we're lining up volunteers for the St. Nicholas fall festival....
body: Coach Joyce, we're lining up volunteers for the St. Nicholas fall festival. Could you run the game booth again? The kids love the ring toss you built.

subject: Re: Parish festival volunteers
snippet: Happy to. I'll touch up the ring toss in the workshop beforehand, a couple ...
body: Happy to. I'll touch up the ring toss in the workshop beforehand, a couple pegs are loose. Put me down for the Saturday afternoon shift after Mass duties.

subject: Knights of Columbus pancake breakfast
snippet: Reminder: the Knights of Columbus pancake breakfast is the second Sunday af...
body: Reminder: the Knights of Columbus pancake breakfast is the second Sunday after the 9:30 Mass. All proceeds go to the youth programs. Hope to see you and Gloria there.

subject: Appointment confirmation - Allegheny Community Health
snippet: This is a confirmation for your annual physical with Dr. Henry Polak on the...
body: This is a confirmation for your annual physical with Dr. Henry Polak on the scheduled date at 9:15 AM. Please arrive 15 minutes early and bring your current medication list. Reply CONFIRM or call to reschedule.

subject: Re: Appointment confirmation - Allegheny Community Health
snippet: Confirmed, thank you. I'll bring the list. Quick question for the doctor — ...
body: Confirmed, thank you. I'll bring the list. Quick question for the doctor — I'd like to talk about the knee before I get back on the field in spring.

subject: Knee follow-up reminder - Three Rivers Orthopedics
snippet: Reminder from Three Rivers Orthopedics: your follow-up with Dr. Rebecca Tor...
body: Reminder from Three Rivers Orthopedics: your follow-up with Dr. Rebecca Torrance is coming up. Please complete the intake form online beforehand and bring your imaging if done elsewhere.

subject: Re: Knee follow-up reminder - Three Rivers Orthopedics
snippet: Got it, I'll fill out the form tonight. The exercises Nicole gave me have h...
body: Got it, I'll fill out the form tonight. The exercises Nicole gave me have helped a lot, but I still want to have her look at it before the season.

subject: Your Steelers Weekly: matchup preview inside
snippet: Get ready for Sunday with our full matchup preview, injury report, and pred...
body: Get ready for Sunday with our full matchup preview, injury report, and predictions. Plus: exclusive member deals on the new sideline collection. Manage your email preferences at the bottom of this message.

subject: Harbor Freight: this weekend only, tool blowout
snippet: Save big this weekend on clamps, drill bits, and shop vacs. Inside Track me...
body: Save big this weekend on clamps, drill bits, and shop vacs. Inside Track members get an extra 20% off. Prices this low won't last — visit your nearest store or shop online. Unsubscribe anytime.

subject: Rockler: free woodworking class this month
snippet: Join us for a free in-store demo on dovetail joints and finishing technique...
body: Join us for a free in-store demo on dovetail joints and finishing techniques. Seating is limited. Plus, new arrivals in hardwood and a fresh batch of shop jigs. Update your preferences below.

subject: AARP Bulletin: your December member update
snippet: This month: Medicare open enrollment tips, staying active in winter, and me...
body: This month: Medicare open enrollment tips, staying active in winter, and member discounts on travel and dining. As always, you can adjust which emails you receive or unsubscribe at the link below.

subject: Giant Eagle myPerks: 4x fuelperks+ this week
snippet: Earn 4x fuelperks+ on all grocery purchases through Sunday. Your personaliz...
body: Earn 4x fuelperks+ on all grocery purchases through Sunday. Your personalized coupons are ready in the app. Don't miss this week's featured savings on holiday roasts. Manage email settings here.

subject: Yuengling: news from America's Oldest Brewery
snippet: Discover our seasonal lineup and find a retailer near you. Plus behind-the-...
body: Discover our seasonal lineup and find a retailer near you. Plus behind-the-scenes stories from Pottsville. You are receiving this because you signed up at a tasting event. Unsubscribe below.

subject: The Home Depot: winter project savings
snippet: Tackle your indoor projects with special buys on shelving, lighting, and pa...
body: Tackle your indoor projects with special buys on shelving, lighting, and paint. Free delivery on orders over $45. Your local store has extended holiday hours. Change your email frequency anytime.

subject: Netflix: new this week for you
snippet: Based on your watch history, here are new arrivals we think you'll like — i...
body: Based on your watch history, here are new arrivals we think you'll like — including a new documentary series and returning favorites. Manage your notification settings in Account.

subject: Snow tires and the driveway
snippet: The guy at the shop said our tires are getting bald before winter. Can you ...
body: The guy at the shop said our tires are getting bald before winter. Can you take the truck in this week, or should I? Don't want to slide down Grant Ave in January.

subject: Re: Snow tires and the driveway
snippet: I'll run it over to Baierl on Thursday after breakfast with Eddie. While it...
body: I'll run it over to Baierl on Thursday after breakfast with Eddie. While it's up I'll have them check the brakes too. We'll be set before the first snow.

subject: Ring doorbell notifications
snippet: The Ring keeps buzzing my phone every time a leaf blows past the porch. Can...
body: The Ring keeps buzzing my phone every time a leaf blows past the porch. Can you ask Matt how to turn down the sensitivity? It went off nine times during my nap.

subject: Re: Ring doorbell notifications
snippet: Ha, I'll have him walk me through it Sunday. In the meantime it caught the ...
body: Ha, I'll have him walk me through it Sunday. In the meantime it caught the mailman and a very suspicious squirrel, so at least it's earning its keep.

subject: Gutters before the leaves fall
snippet: Reminder that the gutters need cleaning before the maples drop everything. ...
body: Reminder that the gutters need cleaning before the maples drop everything. Please use the good ladder and NOT the rickety one, and only when I'm home.

subject: Re: Gutters before the leaves fall
snippet: Yes ma'am. Danny said he'd hold the ladder Saturday morning so you can rela...
body: Yes ma'am. Danny said he'd hold the ladder Saturday morning so you can relax. I'll do the back porch downspout too, it's been overflowing.

subject: Anniversary dinner
snippet: Should we do something for our anniversary or keep it low key this year? I'...
body: Should we do something for our anniversary or keep it low key this year? I'm happy either way as long as I don't have to cook.

subject: Re: Anniversary dinner
snippet: Let's go to the Church Brew Works, we haven't been in ages. I'll make the r...
body: Let's go to the Church Brew Works, we haven't been in ages. I'll make the reservation. Forty-six years and you still put up with me — that's worth a nice dinner.

subject: Re: Anniversary dinner
snippet: Forty-six. Book it for 7. And no talking about baseball lineups at the tabl...
body: Forty-six. Book it for 7. And no talking about baseball lineups at the table, Coach.

subject: Emma's reading list
snippet: Emma finished the whole detective series you've been feeding her. She's ask...
body: Emma finished the whole detective series you've been feeding her. She's asking for recommendations from Pap. Got any old favorites she might like?

subject: Re: Emma's reading list
snippet: Tell her to try the Hardy Boys — they held up for me and Eddie back in the ...
body: Tell her to try the Hardy Boys — they held up for me and Eddie back in the day. I've still got a couple originals in the workshop I can pass down to her.

subject: Jake's first game ball
snippet: Jake will not stop talking about the game ball you gave him after Saturday....
body: Jake will not stop talking about the game ball you gave him after Saturday. He slept with it. You've created a monster, Coach Pap.

subject: Re: Jake's first game ball
snippet: That's what it's all about. He earned it — hustled out a double and never q...
body: That's what it's all about. He earned it — hustled out a double and never quit on the play. Tell him the next one he has to work for too.

subject: Fixing the porch swing
snippet: Nicole loves that porch swing you built us but one of the chain links is we...
body: Nicole loves that porch swing you built us but one of the chain links is wearing thin. Can you take a look next time you're over? Don't want it dropping the kids.

subject: Re: Fixing the porch swing
snippet: Bring it by the workshop or I'll come to you — either way I'll swap the who...
body: Bring it by the workshop or I'll come to you — either way I'll swap the whole chain, I've got heavier gauge on the shelf. Safety first with those two.

subject: Nicole's marathon
snippet: I'm running the Pittsburgh half in the spring! Would love the family at the...
body: I'm running the Pittsburgh half in the spring! Would love the family at the finish line. I know it's during baseball but there's a morning start.

subject: Re: Nicole's marathon
snippet: We'll be there with a sign and a cowbell. So proud of you. Just promise me ...
body: We'll be there with a sign and a cowbell. So proud of you. Just promise me you'll actually stretch — I don't want to be your knee patient too.

subject: Rainout call for Saturday
snippet: Radar looks ugly for Saturday morning. As head coach it's your call on the ...
body: Radar looks ugly for Saturday morning. As head coach it's your call on the 10 AM game. Field's already soft from Thursday. What do you want to tell the parents?

subject: Re: Rainout call for Saturday
snippet: Call it. No sense tearing up the infield and risking a kid slipping. Let's ...
body: Call it. No sense tearing up the infield and risking a kid slipping. Let's move it to Sunday after 1 if the other coaches agree. I'll send the parent email.

subject: Team photo day
snippet: Photo day is set for the Saturday before the picnic. Photographer needs the...
body: Photo day is set for the Saturday before the picnic. Photographer needs the roster with jersey numbers and the coaches' names for the team plaque. Can you send yours?

subject: Re: Team photo day
snippet: Roster's attached in my reply. Put me down simply as 'Coach Joyce' on the p...
body: Roster's attached in my reply. Put me down simply as 'Coach Joyce' on the plaque, that's what the kids call me anyway. Jake's number 4, don't let them swap it.

subject: Concession stand volunteers
snippet: We're short on concession stand help for the home stand. Any chance a coupl...
body: We're short on concession stand help for the home stand. Any chance a couple of your team parents can cover an inning or two? Hot dogs sell themselves but someone's gotta flip them.

subject: Re: Concession stand volunteers
snippet: Carla Jankowski already offered and she'll wrangle two more moms. I'll brin...
body: Carla Jankowski already offered and she'll wrangle two more moms. I'll bring my own tongs — the ones there are bent to hell. We'll keep the line moving.

subject: Lector schedule
snippet: We're building the lector and usher schedule for the 9:30 Mass through the ...
body: We're building the lector and usher schedule for the 9:30 Mass through the winter. Are you and Gloria able to take a Sunday a month again? You're two of our most reliable.

subject: Re: Lector schedule
snippet: Sign us up. Put us on the second Sunday when you can, so it doesn't clash w...
body: Sign us up. Put us on the second Sunday when you can, so it doesn't clash with the away games. Gloria will lector, I'll usher and wrangle the collection baskets.

subject: Bill reminder from PNC
snippet: This is an automated reminder that your monthly statement is now available ...
body: This is an automated reminder that your monthly statement is now available in Online Banking. No action is needed if your autopay is active. To manage alert preferences, sign in to your account.

subject: Costco December savings book
snippet: Your December savings are here — members save on electronics, seasonal roas...
body: Your December savings are here — members save on electronics, seasonal roasts, and shop essentials in warehouse and online. Executive members earn 2% back. Update your email settings anytime.

subject: Woodcraft Magazine: winter project ideas
snippet: Warm up the shop with our winter project roundup: cutting boards, a keepsak...
body: Warm up the shop with our winter project roundup: cutting boards, a keepsake box, and a beginner-friendly stool. Plus new hand tools and a sale on finishing supplies. Unsubscribe below.

subject: Pittsburgh Pirates: season ticket renewal
snippet: Lock in your seats for next season at PNC Park with early renewal pricing a...
body: Lock in your seats for next season at PNC Park with early renewal pricing and flexible plans. New promotional nights and giveaways announced. Manage your communication preferences here.

subject: Ace Hardware: rewards points expiring
snippet: You have rewards points set to expire at the end of the month. Redeem them ...
body: You have rewards points set to expire at the end of the month. Redeem them on tools, hardware, and paint at your neighborhood Ace. Visit us or shop online. Adjust email frequency anytime.

subject: Eddie: cornhole boards
snippet: You still got that jig for the cornhole boards? My grandson wants a set in ...
body: You still got that jig for the cornhole boards? My grandson wants a set in Steelers colors for Christmas and I'm not paying eighty bucks online.

subject: Re: Eddie: cornhole boards
snippet: I've got the jig and a sheet of birch ply already cut. Come by the workshop...
body: I've got the jig and a sheet of birch ply already cut. Come by the workshop Saturday afternoon and we'll knock out a set. You sand, I'll route. Bring the paint.

subject: Eddie: ice on the ramp
snippet: Careful heading to Rosie's tomorrow, the ramp by the door was a sheet of ic...
body: Careful heading to Rosie's tomorrow, the ramp by the door was a sheet of ice this morning. Nearly went down like a sack of bricks. Rosie's getting salt.

subject: Re: Eddie: ice on the ramp
snippet: Appreciate the heads up. I'll take the long way in through the side. Last t...
body: Appreciate the heads up. I'll take the long way in through the side. Last thing I need is Dr. Torrance telling me I told you so about that knee.

subject: Physical results are in
snippet: Your recent lab results from Dr. Polak are available in the patient portal....
body: Your recent lab results from Dr. Polak are available in the patient portal. Everything is within normal range; the doctor noted your blood pressure is well controlled. No follow-up needed until your next annual visit.

subject: Re: Physical results are in
snippet: That's a relief, thank you. I'll keep up the walks with Gloria. See you nex...
body: That's a relief, thank you. I'll keep up the walks with Gloria. See you next year — and tell the front desk the new coffee in the waiting room is a big improvement.

subject: Grandkids sleepover
snippet: Danny and Nicole want a night out for their anniversary. I told them we'd t...
body: Danny and Nicole want a night out for their anniversary. I told them we'd take Sophie and Luca overnight Saturday. You okay with a little chaos?

subject: Re: Grandkids sleepover
snippet: Bring on the chaos. I'll build a fort in the living room and we'll watch a ...
body: Bring on the chaos. I'll build a fort in the living room and we'll watch a movie. Luca still on the dinosaur kick? I'll dig out Matt's old T-rex from the attic.

subject: Re: Grandkids sleepover
snippet: Very much still dinosaurs. And Sophie will want the pancakes shaped like Mi...
body: Very much still dinosaurs. And Sophie will want the pancakes shaped like Mickey. You're on breakfast duty, Grandpa.
